name: Organic Earth
author: akellainmotion
description: Natural colors, organic shapes, warm tones, hand-crafted feel

componentOverrides.button: bg-amber-800 text-amber-50 rounded-lg font-medium px-6 py-3 hover:bg-amber-700 transition-all border-0
componentOverrides.card: bg-white rounded-lg border border-amber-200 shadow-sm p-6
componentOverrides.input: bg-stone-50 rounded-lg border border-stone-300 focus:border-amber-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-200 px-4 py-2
componentOverrides.link: text-amber-800 hover:text-amber-600 transition-colors underline underline-offset-2 decoration-amber-300
componentOverrides.badge: bg-olive-100 text-olive-800 rounded-md text-xs font-medium px-2 py-1
componentOverrides.alert: bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-lg p-4 text-amber-900
